recommendations.title: The End of the Tour
recommendations.overview: The story of the five-day interview between Rolling Stone reporter David Lipsky and acclaimed novelist David Foster Wallace, which took place right after the 1996 publication of Wallace's groundbreaking epic novel, 'Infinite Jest.'

recommendations.title: Smashed
recommendations.overview: Kate and Charlie like to have a good time. Their marriage thrives on a shared fondness for music, laughter… and getting smashed. When Kate’s partying spirals into hard-core asocial behavior, compromising her job as an elementary schoolteacher, someth

recommendations.title: The Circle
recommendations.overview: A young tech worker takes a job at a powerful Internet corporation, quickly rises up the company's ranks, and soon finds herself in a perilous situation concerning privacy, surveillance and freedom. She comes to learn that her decisions and actions w

recommendations.title: A Little Thing Called Love
recommendations.overview: An introverted young girl falls in love with a popular senior. However, as she begins to come out of her shell, she faces several new problems.
recommendations.director: Wasin Pokpong, Puttipong Promsaka Na Sakolnakorn

recommendations.title: Sierra Burgess Is a Loser
recommendations.overview: A case of mistaken identity results in unexpected romance when the most popular girl in high school and the biggest loser must come together to win over their crushes.

recommendations.title: Remember the Night
recommendations.overview: Unexpected love blossoms when an assistant district attorney agrees to take a recidivist shoplifter home so she doesn't have to spend Christmas alone in jail.

recommendations.title: The Party
recommendations.overview: A thirteen-year-old French girl deals with moving to a new city and school in Paris, while at the same time her parents are getting a divorce.

recommendations.title: To All the Boys: Always and Forever
recommendations.overview: Senior year of high school takes center stage as Lara Jean returns from a family trip to Korea and considers her college plans — with and without Peter.

recommendations.title: Innocence
recommendations.overview: Yusuf is released from prison after serving a ten year sentence. Because of unexpected problems at his sister’s house, he finds himself in a cheap hotel where he meets a man, a woman, and a child who will change his life in unexpected ways…

recommendations.title: A Tale of Springtime
recommendations.overview: The story of an introverted young girl  just reaching adulthood who takes a liking to an older woman she meets at a party and determines to match her off with her father, despite the latter's already having a lover of his own.
